title: Colymbada polymorpha
taxonomy: Colymbada polymorpha is classified within the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It belongs to the genus Colymbada, which is a genus of flowering plants. The species Colymbada polymorpha is native to Europe, particularly in the mountainous regions. Colymbada polymorpha is also known as Jacob's ladder, a name that is sometimes used for other species within the same genus. This classification suggests that Colymbada polymorpha is closely related to other plants in the Asteraceae family.
